name: Vocal Speak-To-Camera Hook
trigger: Spoken setup naming who and what
template: [SURPRISING PREMISE], so I'm going to [ACTION/EXPERIMENT].
why_it_works: Audiences immediately know who is involved, the theme, and that a reaction is coming at the end.
examples: Apparently jackfruit can look and taste like pulled pork, so I'm going to try and trick my husband.

name: On-Screen Text Block Hook
trigger: Unusual premise shown as on-screen text
template: [DOING SOMETHING UNUSUAL] for [PERSON]
why_it_works: An abnormal premise sparks curiosity and hints a reaction is coming, giving context the spoken audio alone wouldn't.
examples: Making my wife PB&J Spaghetti

name: Caption Cliffhanger Hook
template: It's that [VAGUE DETAIL] that's going to keep me [OUTCOME].
why_it_works: The caption hints at what's to come and makes the viewer curious how the video resolves, encouraging a full watch.
examples: It's that drive on the back 9 that's going to keep me coming back.
I can't believe her face when she took the first bite!

name: Three C's Claim Hook
trigger: Clarity, context and curiosity in one line
template: My [RELATIONSHIP] has been telling me that they can [IMPRESSIVE/DOUBTFUL FEAT].
why_it_works: It gives context (who and what), clarity on the video's value, and sparks curiosity about whether the feat is possible.
examples: My wife has been telling me that she can eat an entire watermelon in one sitting.

name: Change Your Mind Challenge
trigger: Promise to flip a belief on a timer
template: I bet I can change your mind about [XX] in 20 seconds
why_it_works: A confident promise plus a tight time frame dares the viewer to stay and test the claim.
examples: I bet I can change your mind about XX in 20 seconds

name: Stranger Beats Me Challenge
template: Seeing if a stranger can beat me at [XX]
why_it_works: An open contest with an unknown outcome creates suspense the viewer wants resolved.
examples: Seeing if a stranger can beat me at XX

name: Most Intense Moment Tease
template: I just experienced the most [EMBARRASSMENT/ADRENALINE] in my life..
why_it_works: Promising an extreme personal moment makes viewers stay to see what happened.
examples: I just experienced the most (embarrassment/adrenaline) in my life..

name: Capturing Their Reaction Hook
template: Recording [PERSON]'s reaction to [XX]..
why_it_works: The viewer stays to see the unscripted reaction the creator promises to capture.
examples: Recording (insert person)'s reaction to XX..

name: Last Person Standing Hook
trigger: Endurance contest with a prize stake
template: Last person to do [XX] gets [XX]
why_it_works: A clear prize and competitive stakes pull viewers in to see who wins.
examples: Last person to do XX gets XX

name: Time-Saving Tip Hook
template: This [XX] tip will save you [XX] hours
why_it_works: A specific, quantified benefit clarifies the value and gives a reason to keep watching.
examples: This XX tip will save you XX hours

name: Why I Bought This Hook
template: This [FEATURE] is why I bought [XXX]
why_it_works: Pointing to one specific feature as the deciding factor makes viewers curious what it is.
examples: This (feature) is why I bought XXX

name: Can They Guess It Hook
template: Seeing if [PERSON] can guess if [XX] is [HOMEMADE]
why_it_works: An open guessing game with a yes/no payoff keeps viewers watching for the answer.
examples: Seeing if (insert person) can guess if XX is (homemade)

name: I Do It Differently Hook
template: Instead of using [XX] like everyone else... I use this instead!
why_it_works: Positioning against the norm signals a fresh take the viewer hasn't seen.
examples: Instead of using XX like everyone else... I use this instead!

name: Tips I Wish I Knew
trigger: Numbered tips with a saved-best hint
template: 3 '[XXX]' tips I wish I knew earlier (the last one blew my mind)
why_it_works: A numbered list plus a tease about the final item keeps viewers to the end.
examples: 3 'XXX' tips I wish I knew earlier (the last one blew my mind)

name: Daily Essentials List Hook
template: The 4 [XXX] products I can't start my day without
why_it_works: A specific count of essentials promises a clear, skimmable payoff worth watching.
examples: The 4 XXX products I can't start my day without

name: Loser Has To Hook
template: Loser of [CHALLENGE] has to [XX]
why_it_works: A consequence on the line raises the stakes and tension of the contest.
examples: Loser of (insert challenge) has to XX

name: How I Made This Much
trigger: Specific income figure plus method tease
template: How I made '[$AMOUNT]' in one week doing [XXX]!
why_it_works: A concrete, surprising number promises a payoff the viewer wants the method behind.
examples: How I made '$3500' in one week doing XXX!

name: Only One Talking About It
template: Why am I the only one talking about [XXX]??
why_it_works: Framing the info as rare or ignored makes it feel like exclusive knowledge.
examples: Why am I the only one talking about XXX??

name: Craziest Feature Reveal
template: This [XXX] has the craziest feature!
why_it_works: Calling a feature 'craziest' promises a reveal viewers stay to see.
examples: This XXX has the craziest feature!

name: Secretly Filmed Them Hook
template: I secretly filmed [PERSON] doing [XX]. This is what happened..
why_it_works: The 'this is what happened' cliffhanger guarantees an unresolved payoff.
examples: I secretly filmed (insert person) doing XX. This is what happened..

name: Best Money I Spent
trigger: Specific price framed as a top buy
template: The best $[AMOUNT] I've ever spent on a [XX] product.
why_it_works: An exact dollar figure plus a superlative endorsement signals a worthwhile recommendation.
examples: The best $47 dollars I've ever spent on a XX product.

name: I Bet You Didn't Know
template: I bet you didn't know [XXX] about [XXX]
why_it_works: Betting against the viewer's knowledge baits them to stay and learn the fact.
examples: I bet you didn't know XXX about XXX

name: Try This Next Tip
trigger: Actionable tip to apply next time
template: Try this tip next when doing [XX]
why_it_works: A direct, usable tip promises immediate practical value.
examples: Try this tip next when doing XX

name: How Fast Can I Do It
template: Seeing how quickly I can do [XX]..
why_it_works: A speed test with an open outcome makes viewers stay to see the result.
examples: Seeing how quickly I can do XX..
